title: coleus zeylanicus
intro: Coleus zeylanicus, also known as Coleus aromaticus, is a plant species that belongs to the family Lamiaceae and is native to Sri Lanka. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and alkaloids. The health benefits of Coleus zeylanicus include the treatment of fever, headaches, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a digestive aid and to reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of Coleus zeylanicus include infusions, decoctions, and essential oil extracts, which can be used topically or ingested under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
